name: Studio D Salon
hero_tagline: Hair, nails, and a little time for yourself — right on Market Street.
about: Studio D is a full-service salon in the heart of Baltimore — the kind of place where you settle in for a couple of hours and walk out feeling like the week starts fresh. Cut, color, nails, and waxing — six days a week.

hero_image.alt: A warm hair salon interior with chairs and mirrors.

visual_note: Cream + soft blush + deep aubergine accent; serif headline; soft mirror-light photography.
